name: Policy tuning suite
description: Near-miss buyer wording checks that prove strict policies catch subtle drift without blocking safe paraphrases.

cases.name: Regulated safe threshold and approval wording emits
references: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.
Payments are released after manager approval.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review. Payments are released after manager approval.

cases.name: Regulated review-window paraphrase emits
references: Policy withdrawals over 10000 GBP require enhanced review.
The customer is eligible for manual review within 3 business days.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Policy withdrawals over 10000 GBP still require enhanced review. The customer can receive manual review within 3 business days.

cases.name: Regulated no-longer approval drift blocks
references: Payments require manager approval before release.
Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Payments no longer need manager approval before release.

cases.name: Regulated optional approval wording blocks
references: Payments require manager approval before release.
Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Manager approval is optional before payments release.

cases.name: Agent read-only view wording emits
references: The support agent reads support tickets.
The support agent uses read only CRM access.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The support agent views support tickets. The support agent keeps CRM access read only.

cases.name: Agent CRM edit and removal drift blocks
references: The support agent reads support tickets.
The support agent uses read only CRM access.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The support agent edits CRM records. The support agent removes CRM records.

cases.name: Agent sending without approval blocks
references: The email agent writes draft emails.
The email agent requires user approval before sending emails.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The email agent sends customer emails without user approval.

cases.name: Code review auth-safe paraphrase emits
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The patch moves dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1. Authentication behavior remains unchanged.

cases.name: Code review auth optional drift blocks
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1. Authentication behavior is optional.

cases.name: Code review major-version drift blocks
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 2.0.0. Authentication behavior remains unchanged.
